description: Reduced reproducibility package supporting the manuscript 'Acceptance-gated bonded-template DEM reveals localized fracture sequences in Li4SiO4 ceramic breeder beds'. The package contains processed single-pebble validation summaries, corrected-bed thermo histories, mother-pebble bond-series tables, breakage-event tables, native force-network summaries, figure source data, manuscript figures and post-processing scripts. Very large DEM restart files and full raw local-bond dump histories are not included in this reduced package and can be assembled as larger audit bundles on reasonable request.
notes: Before final upload, confirm author names, affiliations, license choice, repository community and whether ORCID identifiers should be added. Repository identifier inserted for manuscript submission: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20687351.
